# Smart Designer Decorations - ديكورات المصمم الذكي

> Professional decoration and interior design services in Makkah and Jeddah, Saudi Arabia.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://smartdecorat.com) - Main site with hero, services, projects, blog, gallery
- [About](https://smartdecorat.com/about) - About the company
- [Services](https://smartdecorat.com/services) - Decoration services list
- [Projects](https://smartdecorat.com/projects) - Portfolio of decoration projects
- [Blog](https://smartdecorat.com/blog) - Articles about interior design
- [Gallery](https://smartdecorat.com/gallery) - Photo gallery of completed work
- [Decoration Materials](https://smartdecorat.com/materials) - Material categories and products
- [FAQ](https://smartdecorat.com/faq) - Frequently asked questions
- [Contact](https://smartdecorat.com/contact) - Contact information and form
- [Privacy Policy](https://smartdecorat.com/privacy) - Privacy policy
- [Terms of Service](https://smartdecorat.com/terms) - Terms and conditions

## Services
- Interior design and decoration
- Exterior design and facade decoration
- Wall decoration solutions (wallpaper, foam, steel)
- Gypsum ceilings and false ceilings with integrated lighting
- Flooring and parquet installation
- Decorative lighting and mirrors
- Luxury curtains and upholstery
- Stone and marble cladding
- Landscape and garden design
- Custom furniture manufacturing
- Full project finishing
- Renovation and maintenance

## Location-Specific Pages
- Decoration services in [Makkah](https://smartdecorat.com/mecca-decoration)
- Decoration services in [Jeddah](https://smartdecorat.com/jeddah-decoration)
